project.description: A community-driven initiative focused on delivering urgent humanitarian support to injured individuals and amputees in Gaza through transparent and organized efforts.
goals: Provide urgent medical support to injured individuals
Deliver humanitarian aid efficiently and transparently
Bridge donors with real cases in need

about.title: About Us
about.story: Tamkin is a community-driven humanitarian initiative founded by young people from Gaza and Egypt. It was created to support the people of Gaza in general, with a primary focus on injured individuals and amputees who are facing the most critical humanitarian conditions.
about.mission: To deliver fast, transparent, and effective humanitarian support to injured individuals and amputees in Gaza, while also contributing to broader humanitarian relief efforts.
about.vision: To become a reliable humanitarian bridge that connects urgent support with those most in need in Gaza.

whyThisProject.title: Why This Project?
whyThisProject.content: Due to the urgent need for a structured and transparent platform that ensures aid reaches rightful beneficiaries directly without administrative delays or resource loss.

transparency.policy: We are committed to maintaining transparency in operations and publishing updates when available.
transparency.verification: All operations are subject to internal verification and review.
